Index.meta_description: A flexible, production-ready Next.js starter kit for landing pages, custom backends, and full-stack applications.
Index.features_subtitle: Choose the architecture that fits your project. Everything else stays the same.
Index.feature_1_description: Pure frontend. No database required. Build fast, static, or dynamic marketing sites with full i18n, SEO, and Tailwind styling out of the box.
Index.feature_2_description: Connect to your own external API using the built-in ApiClient. Your Next.js app stays lean — just UI and data fetching from your separate backend.
Index.feature_3_description: Built-in backend with Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, and Next.js Route Handlers. Everything you need for a production app, right inside this project.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Footer.about_text: Welcome to kiaya taxi, your trusted and registered transportation service provider in kiaya, Japan.
